CREATE TABLE handlers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, iso_639 VARCHAR(10), rfc_1766 VARCHAR(10), handler_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO handlers (id, iso_639, rfc_1766, handler_name) VALUES (1, 'en', 'en-US', 'English Handler');
INSERT INTO handlers (id, iso_639, rfc_1766, handler_name) VALUES (2, 'fr', 'fr-FR', 'French Handler');
INSERT INTO handlers (id, iso_639, rfc_1766, handler_name) VALUES (3, 'en', 'en-GB', 'English UK Handler');
UPDATE handlers SET handler_name = 'Updated English Handler' WHERE rfc_1766 = 'en-US';
UPDATE handlers SET handler_name = 'Updated English UK Handler' WHERE iso_639 = 'en' AND rfc_1766 != 'en-GB';
INSERT INTO handlers (id, iso_639, rfc_1766, handler_name) VALUES (4, 'es', 'es-ES', 'Spanish Handler');
INSERT INTO handlers (id, iso_639, rfc_1766, handler_name) VALUES (5, 'it', 'it-IT', 'Italian Handler');
SELECT * FROM handlers WHERE iso_639 = 'en' AND rfc_1766 IN (SELECT rfc_1766 FROM handlers WHERE id < 5);
SELECT h1.handler_name FROM handlers h1 JOIN handlers h2 ON h1.iso_639 = h2.iso_639 WHERE h1.rfc_1766 != h2.rfc_1766;
INSERT INTO handlers (id, iso_639, rfc_1766, handler_name) VALUES (6, 'zh', 'zh-CN', 'Chinese Handler');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS handler_count FROM handlers WHERE iso_639 = 'de';
UPDATE handlers SET handler_name = 'Replacement Handler' WHERE iso_639 = 'es' AND rfc_1766 = 'es-ES';
SELECT h.handler_name FROM handlers h WHERE h.iso_639 = (SELECT MAX(iso_639) FROM handlers) AND h.rfc_1766 = (SELECT MIN(rfc_1766) FROM handlers);
